blended.narrative: Jiminy Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 60°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
